creator: mckusick@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Ed Maste from comment #19)
Reading through the comments for this bug, it appears that it was being caused by the lack of a memory barrier on the ARM64. The fact that it was not appearing on any other architectures and that Andrew Turner's addition of a memory barrier instruction seemed to fix the problem leads me to believe that this report has been resolved (at least if Andrew committed his change). If Andrew's change has not been committed, then it seems like it should be.
